overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Weston Plan Commission was scheduled to meet on May 11, 2026, to consider a site plan for a new police and municipal court facility, review an ongoing salt storage inspection program for wellhead protection, and receive updates on staff-approved projects and building permits. The meeting included provisions for both in-person and remote public participation via Zoom.

agenda.item: Open public comment period for items not on agenda as public hearings
Minutes from April 13, 2026, Plan Commission Meeting
Unfinished Business – Creation of a Salt Storage Shed Inspection Program – Wellhead Protection District
Site Plan Review - Project #20260116 - Mountain Bay Metro Police Department & Municipal Court Facility – 3600 Community Center Drive
April 2026 Staff-Approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans
Planning & Development Department Monthly Project Update Report
Future Agenda Items or Staff Referrals

discussions.item: Salt Storage Shed Inspection Program – Wellhead Protection District
discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to continue discussion on unfinished business regarding the creation of a salt storage shed inspection program within the Wellhead Protection District. This item was expected to address groundwater protection measures related to salt storage facilities in the village.

discussions.item: Site Plan Review - Mountain Bay Metro Police Department & Municipal Court Facility
discussions.body: The commission was set to review Project #20260116, a site plan for a new Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court Facility at 3600 Community Center Drive. This represents a significant public safety infrastructure project for the community.

discussions.item: April 2026 Staff-Approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans
discussions.body: Commissioners were scheduled to receive a report on certified survey maps and site plans that received staff approval during April 2026. This informational item provides oversight of administrative development approvals.
The commission was set to review building permit activity from April 2026. This regular report provides commissioners with information on construction and development activity in the village.

discussions.item: Planning & Development Department Monthly Project Update Report
discussions.body: Staff was expected to present a monthly update on ongoing planning and development projects. This report keeps commissioners informed of department activities and project status.

discussions.item: Future Agenda Items or Staff Referrals
discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to discuss potential future agenda items including electric vehicle charging stations and the 2026 Housing Affordability Report. These topics were identified for upcoming meeting consideration.

publicComment: Public comment period was scheduled for items not appearing on the agenda as public hearings, with options to submit comments in advance or participate live via Zoom.
actionItems: Scheduled to consider approval of April 13, 2026 meeting minutes
Expected to take action on salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection
Scheduled to review site plan for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department & Municipal Court Facility
title: Public Works Committee - 5/11/2026
